questions.question: What is a software process framework?
keyPoints: Ensures software projects are executed efficiently, effectively, and consistently

questions.question: What are the phases of the software development life cycle?
What are the benefits of using a software process framework?
keyPoints: Ensures software projects are executed efficiently, effectively, and consistently
Supports collaboration and communication among team members

questions.question: Describe the relationship between a software process framework and quality assurance.
keyPoints: A software process framework ensures that software products meet the required quality standards
It provides guidelines and methodologies for quality assurance

questions.question: Explain how a software process framework supports testing and validation.
keyPoints: A software process framework provides guidelines and methodologies for testing and validation
It ensures that software products meet the required quality standards

questions.question: Describe the role of a software process framework in configuration management.
keyPoints: A software process framework ensures that changes to the software are properly documented and controlled
It provides guidelines and methodologies for configuration management

questions.question: Explain how a software process framework supports maintenance and support.
keyPoints: A software process framework provides guidelines and methodologies for maintenance and support
It ensures that software products continue to meet the required quality standards
